reviews.comment:
Lo que más destaco es la atención del encargado de la caja, super atento, mucha gente para atender y siempre con una sonrisa... el lugar tiene gran variedad de productos, el café riquísimo

(Translated by Google)
What I appreciate most is the service from the cashier; he was incredibly attentive, had a lot of customers to serve, and always had a smile on his face. The place has a great variety of products, and the coffee is delicious.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtNXBMY213RRAB

reviews.comment:
Impecable la comida espectacular rápida atención muy confortable el lugar. Volvería siempre

(Translated by Google)
The food was impeccable, spectacular, the service fast, and the place very comfortable. I would always return.
